applied_fix.action: Increase prominence of the first-step chain framing and primary Generate entry on hook landing.
applied_fix.rationale: Largest loss is before first hook: users are not starting generation.

behavior_surface: Only src/config/v195-chain-top1-fix.json is modified by this script; TikTokChainProgressHint / WorkflowNextStepCard / ReadyToPostModal read it when mode !== none.
expected_effect: Stronger TikTok chain progress hint framing (single module: TikTokChainProgressHint) to improve session_start→hook.
note: top_2_fix not applied per V195.3 (single-variable experiment).

top_2_fix_unchanged.action: Tighten primary button hierarchy so Generate clearly wins over secondary actions.
top_2_fix_unchanged.rationale: If the action exists but is missed, CTA weight fixes convert faster than new copy alone.
